name: build_list
description: Lists EAS builds for a project. Provide either appId (from app.json "extra.eas.projectId") OR appFullName (e.g., "@owner/my-app"). Use this to see recent builds, their status, and available artifacts.

appId.description: The Expo project/app ID (UUID). Get this from app.json at "extra.eas.projectId". Either appId or appFullName is required.

appFullName.description: The full name of the app (e.g., "@owner/my-app"). Use this if you don't have access to app.json. Either appId or appFullName is required.

platform.description: Filter builds by platform (ANDROID or IOS)

status.description: Filter builds by status (IN_QUEUE, IN_PROGRESS, FINISHED, ERRORED, CANCELED)

limit.description: Maximum number of builds to return (default: 10)
